home.title: Become a verified supplier
home.intro: Start a supplier application for one of your organizations. Your application is saved as a draft until you submit it for review.
home.noOrgs: You do not belong to any organization yet. Create one first, then return here to apply.
home.originalLocaleHint: The language you will author your company details in. This original language is always preserved and never machine-translated.
home.legalNameHint: Exactly as it appears on your business registration.

application.title: Supplier application
application.loadError: We could not load this application. Please try again.

notFound.title: Application not found
notFound.body: This application does not exist, or you do not have access to it.

forbidden.title: No access
forbidden.body: You do not have permission to view this supplier application.

companyInfo.title: Company information
companyInfo.intro: Tell us about your business. Registration details are verified against the evidence you provide.
companyInfo.legalNameHint: Class-E: shown left-to-right and never translated.

opticalProfile.title: Optical profile
opticalProfile.intro: Select the supplier types and manufacturing capabilities that describe your business. These are provisional until verified.
opticalProfile.capabilitiesHint: The manufacturing processes you perform in-house.
opticalProfile.facilitiesNote: Factory ownership and count are captured per facility in the Facilities section below.

content.title: Company content
content.intro: Describe your business in your original language. This content is preserved as authored and used as the source for every translation.
content.originalLocaleNote: You are editing the original-language content ({language}).

translations.title: Translations
translations.intro: Add translations of your company content. The original language is authoritative; edits to it mark translations as stale.
translations.staleWarning: The original content changed after this translation was saved — it may be out of date.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.intro: Add the factories, warehouses, and offices behind your business.
facilities.isPublicLabel: Show this facility on the public profile

evidence.note: Upload supporting documents. Files are uploaded directly to secure storage; only PDF, JPEG, PNG, and WebP up to 15 MiB are accepted.

notFound.title: Supplier not found
notFound.body: This supplier profile is not available.

public.fallbackNotice: This profile is shown in {language} because it is not yet available in your language.
public.staleNotice: This information may be out of date.

completeness.title: Completeness
completeness.intro: Complete every item before submitting for review.

review.title: Review and submit
review.intro: When your application is complete, submit it for review. You can withdraw it at any time before a decision.
review.incompleteWarning: Some required items are still incomplete. You can submit, but review may return it for changes.

changeRequests.title: Change requests
changeRequests.intro: Reviewers may ask for changes before approving. Respond to each item, then resubmit.
